name: You.com
description: Web search, research, and content extraction via You.com APIs

webSearch.apiKey.label: You.com API Key
webSearch.apiKey.help: You.com API key for web search and research (optional for search; required for research/contents).

apiKey.description: You.com API key. Optional for search (free tier); required for research and contents. Falls back to YDC_API_KEY env var.
